reviews.review_title: Blitz Tag, The best Gorilla Tag Fangame.
reviews.review_description:
If you're looking for a fun, fast-paced game that’s easy to play and hard to stop, Blitz Tag is where it’s at. It's a twist on regular tag that turns up the intensity and keeps everyone on their toes.

The rules are super simple: one person is "It" and tags others. The twist? Tagged players enter the “Blitz Zone,” where they can try to escape before getting eliminated. It’s a perfect mix of the classic game with just enough added excitement to make it feel fresh.

What makes Blitz Tag so awesome is how fast and intense it is. You’re constantly moving, thinking, and trying to stay one step ahead of the person who's “It.” There’s no waiting around — everyone’s always involved, and the game never slows down. It’s pure adrenaline the whole time.

While you can play solo, Blitz Tag really shines when you play in teams. You’ll need to communicate, plan, and work together to outsmart the other team and avoid getting tagged. It’s a great way to bond with friends and family while having a blast.

You don’t need a fancy setup or a big field to play. Whether you're at a park, in a backyard, or just a schoolyard, Blitz Tag works anywhere. The best part? You can play with just a few people or a big group, and it’s always fun.

Blitz Tag is perfect for all ages. It’s easy to learn, but still enough of a challenge to keep things interesting. It’s the kind of game where everyone has a shot at being the hero, no matter how fast you are.

If you're looking for a game that’s fast, fun, and gets everyone involved, Blitz Tag is hands down the best choice. It’s the perfect blend of simplicity and excitement, and once you start, you won’t want to stop.
